title: Graph Valid Tree
prompt: Implement `is_valid_tree(n, edges)` in `valid_tree.py`. Given `n` nodes labeled `0..n-1` and a list of undirected edges (each `[u, v]` pair), return `True` iff the edges form a valid tree (the graph is connected and contains no cycle). Return `False` otherwise. Do not modify `test_valid_tree.py`.
